utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all these 7 items. Each one is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is clear; travel_dates (September 25–29, 2024) are specific; transportation includes flight details and cost (€120); accommodation includes hotel, amenities, duration, and cost (€450); activities include a list of three activities with individual and total costs (€100); additional_services describes a specific service and its cost (Included); total_budget provides a complete breakdown and ensures it is within the limit (€870). Therefore, all 7 of 7 items are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Lisbon, Portugal', which has a rating of 7 in the ground-truth data. The transportation is a round-trip flight with 'Budget Airlines, Economy Class', which corresponds to the 'budget_airlines' → 'Economy Class' option rated 10. The accommodation is 'Eco Lodge', which is rated 10. The activities listed are 'Hiking Expedition', 'Yoga Retreat', and 'Street Art Tour', which have ratings 10, 10, and 9 respectively. The additional service 'Personalized "Eco-Travel & Visual Storytelling" experience' does not have a direct match in the ground truth, so it is excluded from the mapped ratings.
